channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Key Tech and Consumer Stocks Move Amid Market Volatility
item.description: The stock market experienced notable fluctuations on July 23, 2026, as investors closely monitored major tech and consumer companies. Alphabet (GOOGL), Tesla (TSLA), Nestlé (NESN), and Intel (INTC) sa...

item.title: Gibraltar Airport's Unique Runway Design Allows Planes and Cars to Coexist Safely
item.description: Gibraltar Airport, located in Europe, is renowned for its unconventional design that merges road and runway infrastructure. The airport's runway is interrupted by a road, creating a scenario where dri...

item.title: Supreme Court Transfers NAB Cases to FCC Over Jurisdictional Dispute
item.description: The Supreme Court of Pakistan has resolved a jurisdictional conflict by ruling that it lacks authority over National Accountability Bureau (NAB) cases, transferring all pending criminal appeals to the...

item.title: Zungu faces legal challenges and allegations of intimidation in Safa presidency bid

item.title: Global Music Giants Eye East Africa’s Rising Industry
item.description: East African musicians have long created sounds that transcend borders, attracting international audiences with genres like Bongo Flava and Singeli. However, the region's music industry has faced chal...

item.title: Ansar-Ud-Deen calls for increased school security funding
item.description: The Ansar-Ud-Deen Society of Nigeria has called on the Federal Government to invest more in school security infrastructure to protect students, teachers, and staff from rising threats like kidnapping ...

item.title: Love Island's Priya faces expulsion over job-shaming controversy as summer wellness trends gain traction
item.description: The article highlights a conflict between Love Island contestants Priya and Aidan, who risk being expelled from their villa due to a heated argument with co-star Elicia over her £30k National Rail car...

item.title: Trump's New Tariff Measures Target Global Trading Partners
item.description: President Donald Trump has unveiled new tariffs targeting over 60 trading partners, including China, India, and Europe, imposing rates of 10% to 12.5% on goods imported to the U.S. The move follows th...

item.title: China Coast Guard Continues Water Cannon Attacks on Philippine Vessels Near Bajo de Masinloc
item.description: On July 24, 2026, the China Coast Guard (CCG) escalated tensions in the West Philippine Sea by launching coordinated water cannon attacks and dangerous maneuvers against Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) a...

item.title: Jennifer Lopez's High School Years: From Athlete to Global Superstar

item.title: Kim Kardashian and Kanye West's legal dispute over child custody and financial matters

item.title: U.S.-Iran Clashes Escalate Over Control of Strategic Shipping Routes
item.description: The U.S. military has intensified strikes against Iran amid escalating tensions over control of critical shipping routes, particularly the Strait of Hormuz and the Bab el Mandeb. These strategic water...

item.title: Nairobi Woman's Balcony Escape Due to Landlord Rent Dispute
item.description: A Nairobi woman named Joy has gained attention for her unique morning routine of escaping her apartment via a balcony after her landlord locked the building entrance due to unpaid rent. The incident, ...

item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump's announcement that a nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia depends on the kingdom recognizing Israel has created uncertainty around the agreement, which was signed just days prio...

item.title: Tanzania Leads Kenya in Tourism Revenue Growth

item.title: PFN Calls on Tinubu to Reject Anti-Preaching Bill Amid Concerns Over Religious Freedom
item.description: The Pentecostal Fellowship of Nigeria (PFN) has strongly urged President Bola Tinubu to reject the proposed anti-preaching and hawking bill, calling it unnecessary and targeted at Christians. The Chri...

item.title: Afreximbank funds Shoreline's Algerian oilfield project
item.description: Afreximbank has approved a $200 million loan to support Shoreline Power Company and its Italian subsidiary Arkad S.p.A. in executing a major oilfield project in Algeria. This financing will enable the...
